channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed

item.title: 私は堀口珈琲のファンなんだけども、有明にできた新店舗のビストロ的カフェがすごくいい場所だった。ランチ、カフェ、ディナーが…
item.author: 白央篤司 hakuo atsushi (@hakuo416.bsky.social)
item.description: 私は堀口珈琲のファンなんだけども、有明にできた新店舗のビストロ的カフェがすごくいい場所だった。ランチ、カフェ、ディナーが楽しめ、グラスワインにおつまみなんて使い方もできる。シェフが生地から手作り、キッシュのおいしかったこと。東京ドリームパークの2階奥、豊洲あたりから来る人も増えそうな。
item.content:encoded: 私は堀口珈琲のファンなんだけども、有明にできた新店舗のビストロ的カフェがすごくいい場所だった。ランチ、カフェ、ディナーが楽しめ、グラスワインにおつまみなんて使い方もできる。シェフが生地から手作り、キッシュのおいしかったこと。東京ドリームパークの2階奥、豊洲あたりから来る人も増えそうな。

item.title: AIが普及するほど、セキュリティの知識は「あって当然」の時代になってきました。サイバー攻撃の手口や個人情報の守り方を基礎…
item.author: GRIM×AI秘書MIRA (@grim1149.bsky.social)
item.description:
AIが普及するほど、セキュリティの知識は「あって当然」の時代になってきました。サイバー攻撃の手口や個人情報の守り方を基礎から学べる書籍を、ぜひ一冊手元に置いておくといいかもしれません。🔐 ミラも「知ることが最大の防御です」と言っています。✨

🛒 Amazonで探す 📦

#AIテックニュース #Amazon #生成AI #AI活用 #ChatGPT
item.content:encoded:
AIが普及するほど、セキュリティの知識は「あって当然」の時代になってきました。サイバー攻撃の手口や個人情報の守り方を基礎から学べる書籍を、ぜひ一冊手元に置いておくといいかもしれません。🔐 ミラも「知ることが最大の防御です」と言っています。✨

🛒 Amazonで探す 📦

#AIテックニュース #Amazon #生成AI #AI活用 #ChatGPT

item.title: ((((；ﾟДﾟ)))))))こんばんは🌆 本日もお疲れ様でした🙇‍♀️ 今日は雨が降ったり止んだりでとても蒸し暑…
item.author: わし🤔 (@wa-si-san.bsky.social)
item.description:
((((；ﾟДﾟ)))))))こんばんは🌆
本日もお疲れ様でした🙇‍♀️

今日は雨が降ったり止んだりでとても蒸し暑い１日になりました💦

まだまだ梅雨明けは先になりそうです🤔

さて帰宅して落ち着いたら青空閲覧・巡回致します🫡

それでは素敵な夜をお過ごしください🍀🍀🍀

#いいねいただけると嬉しいです

#AIイラスト
item.content:encoded:
((((；ﾟДﾟ)))))))こんばんは🌆
本日もお疲れ様でした🙇‍♀️

今日は雨が降ったり止んだりでとても蒸し暑い１日になりました💦

まだまだ梅雨明けは先になりそうです🤔

さて帰宅して落ち着いたら青空閲覧・巡回致します🫡

それでは素敵な夜をお過ごしください🍀🍀🍀

#いいねいただけると嬉しいです

#AIイラスト

item.title: Happy Hakurei Hump Day! The current vibe is thinking about R…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Hakurei Hump Day! The current vibe is thinking about Reanimal! ngl Reanimal was such an incredible experience 🥹 the game had an amazing vibe and a ton of chase scenes that were absolutely thrilling, it was an awesome game! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Hakurei Hump Day! The current vibe is thinking about Reanimal! ngl Reanimal was such an incredible experience 🥹 the game had an amazing vibe and a ton of chase scenes that were absolutely thrilling, it was an awesome game! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

室温28.3℃

今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🍵
明日も頑張ろう…🫠

item.title: 【AFFLUX】リング内側に選べる宝石セッティングをプレゼント✧* [開催期間] 2026年7月1日(水)～7月31日…
item.author: 雅-miyabi-【公式】婚約指輪・結婚指輪専門店 (@miyabibridal.bsky.social)
item.description:
【AFFLUX】リング内側に選べる宝石セッティングをプレゼント✧*

[開催期間] 2026年7月1日(水)～7月31日(金)  [ご成約特典]  ✧選べる宝石3種類✧ ・ブルーサファイア ・ピンクサファイア ・ルビー ※デザイン上セッティング不可の指輪あり  指輪1本につき内側に宝石を1石プレゼントいたします💎 (※通常内石代11,000円相当)  ぜひこの機会にお越しくださいませ。

#afflux #アフラックス #結婚指輪 #婚約指輪
#フェア特典
item.content:encoded:
【AFFLUX】リング内側に選べる宝石セッティングをプレゼント✧*

[開催期間] 2026年7月1日(水)～7月31日(金)  [ご成約特典]  ✧選べる宝石3種類✧ ・ブルーサファイア ・ピンクサファイア ・ルビー ※デザイン上セッティング不可の指輪あり  指輪1本につき内側に宝石を1石プレゼントいたします💎 (※通常内石代11,000円相当)  ぜひこの機会にお越しくださいませ。

#afflux #アフラックス #結婚指輪 #婚約指輪
#フェア特典

item.title: HOLY SHIT. FIFA President Gianni Infantino is at the USA g…
item.author: Eliza Orlins (@elizaorlins.bsky.social)
item.description:
HOLY SHIT.

FIFA President Gianni Infantino is at the USA game, sitting with Howard Lutnick, Secretary of Commerce AND CLOSE PERSONAL FRIEND OF JEFFREY EPSTEIN.

Disgusting.
item.content:encoded:
HOLY SHIT.

FIFA President Gianni Infantino is at the USA game, sitting with Howard Lutnick, Secretary of Commerce AND CLOSE PERSONAL FRIEND OF JEFFREY EPSTEIN.

Disgusting.

item.title: “These attempts to evade congressional oversight are unaccep…
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description: “These attempts to evade congressional oversight are unacceptable. The public deserves clear and consistent answers about ICE’s surveillance activities and its infringement of Americans’ civil liberties.”
item.content:encoded: “These attempts to evade congressional oversight are unacceptable. The public deserves clear and consistent answers about ICE’s surveillance activities and its infringement of Americans’ civil liberties.”

item.title: Four conservative justices on the Supreme Court believe Fola…
item.author: Charlotte Clymer (@charlotteclymer.bsky.social)
item.description: Four conservative justices on the Supreme Court believe Folarin Balogun shouldn't be a U.S. citizen. Something to consider as he carries the U.S. team on his back in the World Cup.
item.content:encoded: Four conservative justices on the Supreme Court believe Folarin Balogun shouldn't be a U.S. citizen. Something to consider as he carries the U.S. team on his back in the World Cup.

item.title: What an incredible World Cup by the DR Congo team, who overc…

item.description: What an incredible World Cup by the DR Congo team, who overcame a devastating Ebola outbreak and war, and brought unity and hope to so many through dark times. Fimbu!
item.content:encoded: What an incredible World Cup by the DR Congo team, who overcame a devastating Ebola outbreak and war, and brought unity and hope to so many through dark times. Fimbu!

item.title: Two people in a Volkswagen Beetle died after the massive bat…
item.author: Forbes (@forbes.com)
item.description: Two people in a Volkswagen Beetle died after the massive battery-powered truck struck them at a highway intersection in Nevada, not far from the factory that builds it.
item.content:encoded: Two people in a Volkswagen Beetle died after the massive battery-powered truck struck them at a highway intersection in Nevada, not far from the factory that builds it.

item.title: Many of the babies’ autopsy reports were clear: Vitamin K de…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Many of the babies’ autopsy reports were clear: Vitamin K deficiency was the immediate cause of death, or contributed to it.

The reports also included details about parents refusing the vitamin K shot, a long-standard injection, for their newborns.

(Published May)
item.content:encoded:
Many of the babies’ autopsy reports were clear: Vitamin K deficiency was the immediate cause of death, or contributed to it.

The reports also included details about parents refusing the vitamin K shot, a long-standard injection, for their newborns.

(Published May)

item.title: During his two decades in the New Jersey Senate, Tom Kean Jr…
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description: During his two decades in the New Jersey Senate, Tom Kean Jr. consistently opposed paid sick leave for his constituents.
item.content:encoded: During his two decades in the New Jersey Senate, Tom Kean Jr. consistently opposed paid sick leave for his constituents.

item.title: This is Nala. She thought your face had disappeared. Turns o…
item.author: WeRateDogs (@weratedogs.com)
item.description: This is Nala. She thought your face had disappeared. Turns out it was behind your hands the whole time. Incredible. 12/10 (IG: goldennala27)
item.content:encoded: This is Nala. She thought your face had disappeared. Turns out it was behind your hands the whole time. Incredible. 12/10 (IG: goldennala27)
